title: Pick registry to login from full image name as well
body:
podman login reg.io/username/image works as well now. It picks
the registry and checks for authentication, if none exist it
will prompt for username and password.

Fixes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1690
Waiting for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/535 to get in. Will fix up the vendor.conf and remove the WIP once that is done.

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>
